channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘Your AI Slop Bores Me’ Gives You a Chance to See How the Sausage Is Made
item.description: These days, you don't even need to be good at chess to be a Mechanical Turk.

item.title: 'An unprecedented blow': US medtech giant Stryker suffers global outage after apparent Iranian cyberattack
item.description: Handala allegedly wipes thousands of mobile phones, computers, and servers belonging to Stryker.

item.title: Comment Perplexity transforme votre Mac mini en véritable J.A.R.V.I.S
item.description: L'IA de Perplexity semble avoir trouvé un écrin idéal : le Mac mini. Le petit ordinateur de bureau d'Apple sert désormais de machine d'accueil toute trouvée pour l'assistant IA personnel de l'entreprise américaine, au travers de son nouveau projet « Personal Computer » dévoilé cette semaine.

item.title: Microsoft’s Copilot Health can connect to your medical records and wearables
item.description: Microsoft announced on Thursday that it's launching Copilot Health, a "separate, secure space" in Copilot for asking questions about lab results and medical records, searching for providers, analyzing data from wearables, and other health-related chats. The feature will have a phased rollout, so it won't be available to everyone immediately, but users can join a […]...

item.title: Netflix Has a Great Looking New Shark-Based Weather Disaster Movie
item.description: Jaws swims through the streets in 'Thrash,' starring Phoebe Dynevor, Whitney Peak, and Djimon Hounsou.

item.title: Google is using old news reports and AI to predict flash floods
item.description: A new way to solve data scarcity: Turning qualitative reports into quantitative data with an LLM.

item.title: As if Leica wasn’t exclusive enough already, a US price hike is imminent – adding hundreds of dollars to popular models
item.description: Leica has announced a host of moderate price increases across its M, SL and Q ranges of cameras and lenses.

item.title: The team behind continuous batching says your idle GPUs should be running inference, not sitting dark
item.description: Every GPU cluster has dead time. Training jobs finish, workloads shift and hardware sits dark while power and cooling costs keep running. For neocloud operators, those empty cycles are lost margin.The obvious workaround is spot GPU markets — renting spare capacity to whoever needs it. But spot instances mean the cloud vendor is still the one doing the renting, and engineers buying that capacity are still paying for raw compute with no inference stack attached. FriendliAI's answer is different: run inference directly on the unused hardware, optimize for token throughput, and split the revenue w...

item.title: Whoop calls its new clothing range a 'technical garment system' and I honestly don't know what else I expected
item.description: Whoop courts the hypebeasts with a predictable take on high-fashion athleisure.

item.title: Google is adding major optimizations to Android to make your phone run faster and improve battery life
item.description: Thanks to a tool called AutoFDO, Google is promising that your Android phone will soon be working better than ever.

item.title: « Steam Machine Verified » : Valve précise les conditions requises pour obtenir ce sésame
item.description: Valve a profité de la GDC 2026 pour préciser les conditions requises pour l'obtention du badge « Steam Machine Verified », censé attester qu'un jeu tournera correctement sur la future console de salon du constructeur.

item.title: Spotify’s SongDNA feature doesn’t officially exist yet, but beta users are already calling it the ‘best Spotify feature’ to date
item.description: Users are already loving SongDNA for its in-depth song credits, and it's looking to be a handy new way to discover new artists.

item.title: Black Ops Royale launches in Warzone today to try and help the 'stagnant' with 'the nostalgia of Blackout'
item.description: The next big Call of Duty Warzone mode is set to launch soon.

item.title: Google Maps Gets Chatty With a New Gemini-Powered Interface
item.description: “Ask Maps,” rolling out today to Google Maps on mobile, lets you ask Gemini questions about locations and even to plan trips on your behalf.

item.title: You can now ask Google Maps ‘complex, real-world questions’ — and Gemini will answer
item.description: Google is continuing to weave Gemini into the firmament of its most-used products. Today, it announced that Google Maps was getting a new AI-powered "Ask Maps" feature that allows for "complex, real-world questions" with highly detailed, personalized responses. In the past, Google Maps would struggle with hyper-specific questions like "where can I charge my phone […]...

item.title: Google Maps is getting an AI ‘Ask Maps’ feature and upgraded ‘immersive’ navigation
item.description: The tech giant says the "Immersive Navigation" launch is the biggest update to Maps in over a decade.

item.title: ‘Our biggest navigation upgrade in over a decade’: Google Maps gets two massive Gemini-powered features that you’re going to use all the time
item.description: Google Maps is getting two major Gemini-powered upgrades, including a conversational travel assistant and a major upgrade to its driving navigation — here's what's new.

item.title: Google Maps brings a 3D map to your driving directions
item.description: In recent weeks, Google has been busy adding AI features to all of its most popular apps. Following Gmail and Chrome, Maps is now the latest service to get a Gemini makeover, with a redesign of the driving experience headlining the update. Google is billing the new "Immersive Navigation" mode as the most significant update to driving directions in Maps in about a decade. Now instead of displaying a 2D map of the area around your car, Maps will render the surroundings in 3D. Google believes this transformation will make it easier for drivers to orient themselves, with the new view giving ...

item.title: 'It’s a WordPress that stays with you': WordPress can now run within your browser, letting you build private websites not on the public web
item.description: You can now build your fully private, local website with WordPress that's stored directly within your browser.

item.title: L’influenceuse militaire pro-Trump qui cartonne sur Instagram n’est qu’une IA fétichiste
item.description: Elle pose fièrement avec Donald Trump et Lionel Messi depuis le Bureau ovale, arborant un uniforme de l'armée américaine et un sourire ravageur. Pourtant, Jessica Foster n'existe pas. Cette fausse influenceuse générée par l'intelligence artificielle a dupé plus d'un million de patriotes sur Instagram dans le seul but de les rediriger vers une plateforme pour adultes....

item.title: Amazon propose ce PC portable de Dell (écran IPS, 16 Go de RAM) pour 30 % de moins durant ses Ventes Flash de Printemps
item.description: À première vue, ce Dell 14 semble tout à fait classique, mais ses principales qualités se trouvent sous le capot avec ses 16 Go de RAM et il perd 200 euros chez Amazon pendant les Ventes Flash de Printemps.

item.title: Corsair's 32GB Vengeance RGB Pro deal is a rare win for PC builders - it's on sale for just $230 when you use this promo code
item.description: Save 25% on the 32GB Corsair Vengeance RGB Pro kit right now, a big win for RAM buyers.

item.title: 10 Best Meal Delivery Services, Tested by an Ex-Restaurant Critic
item.description: Here are the best meal kits in 2026, from Martha Stewart’s meal kit to the best meal delivery on a budget.

item.title: I use these 5 clever Claude prompts every day — they make me feel like a genius
item.description: Clever prompts can reveal Claude’s strengths and insightful responses.

item.title: JBL's two new Live headphones offer 80 hours of battery each
item.description: JBL just released two new pairs of headphones in its pre-existing Live line. There's the over-ear Live 780NC and the on-ear Live 680NC. Both sets of headphones have similar specs, despite the difference in design. The biggest news here is likely the battery life. They max out at 80 hours per charge with regular use, which is a fantastic metric. This shrinks to 50 hours when using ANC, but that's still fairly remarkable. We truly live in a golden age of wireless headphone batteries. JBL's new headphones can also fully charge in just two hours, which is nice. They also offer the option for multi...

item.title: The best eco-friendly phone cases for 2026
item.description: We're all holding onto our phones for longer now, and in order to do that, you'll need some protection. Now, with so many good phone cases on the market, you don't have to compromise if you're also trying to live a more eco-conscious life. The best eco-friendly phone cases offer a great blend of durability and sustainability, helping to reduce plastic waste and better the planet.Made from natural materials like biodegradable plastics, recycled ocean waste or even sustainable bamboo, eco-friendly phone cases and compostable phone covers prove that you don’t have to sacrifice style or protection...

item.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer turns your spare Mac into an AI agent
item.description: Perplexity wants to be more than just an answer engine. On Wednesday, it launched Personal Computer, a new AI agent tool that can turn a spare Mac into a locally run AI system, pitching it as "a digital proxy for you." Personal Computer will run 24/7 on a dedicated device on your local network, have […]

item.title: Hasbro’s CEO Says ‘Magic: The Gathering’ and ‘Dungeons & Dragons’ Will Never Use Generative AI
item.description: Both brands already have guidelines in place barring the use of the technology.

item.title: JBL’s new party speaker comes with a karaoke mic that helps you hit those high notes
item.description: Karaoke is more fun for everyone when the person holding the mic sounds as good as a song's original performer. So the latest addition to JBL's PartyBox Bluetooth speaker line, the On-the-Go 2 Plus, comes with one of the company's new EasySing wireless microphones, which use an algorithm to silence a song's vocals while also […]

item.title: Group14 opens factory to produce battery materials for flash charging EVs
item.description: The startup's new BAM-3 facility can make enough silicon anode material annually to supply about 100,000 long-range EVs.

item.title: How to watch Europa League 2025/26 Round of 16: live stream options, free games, TV channels
item.description: All the ways to watch the 2025/26 Europa League Round of 16 live streams online and from anywhere, as Lille vs Aston Villa headlines eight games.

item.title: This new foldable phone may have upstaged Apple in the ‘zero-crease’ wars
item.description: Oppo’s Find N6 isn’t fully creaseless, but it’s close. For some time now, reporting around Apple’s folding phone has coalesced around two beliefs: the device is set to drop this fall, and it will have a significantly less visible display crease than previous folding devices.

item.title: iPhone Fold : design, ergonomie, puissance… tout ce que l’on sait du smartphone pliant d’Apple pour le moment
item.description: L'iPhone pliant d'Apple (iPhone Fold) n'en finit plus de faire causer sans avoir pour le moment plus d'informations à fournir. Nous avons réuni tous les éléments déjà disponibles et voici ce qu'il faut savoir.

item.title: Xbox mode is rolling out to all Windows 11 PCs next month — and some gamers are excited, while others are worried
item.description: The rollout of Windows 11's new Xbox mode has been met with both excitement and skepticism.

item.title: When startups become a family business
item.description: This season on Build Mode, we’re diving into what it takes to build a world-class founding team. This week we’re exploring different kinds of co-founder dynamics and what it takes to build a startup with your family.

item.title: Ces 4 nouveautés arrivent sur votre Mac avec macOS 26.4
item.description: macOS Tahoe 26.4 n'est plus très loin, et avec lui ces quatre nouveautés pour votre Mac.

item.title: This Geekom A5 mini PC deal is an ideal office upgrade, packing Ryzen performance into a compact design, and it's 15% off in Amazon’s Spring Deal sale
item.description: With lots to recommend it, and at a price you can't complain about, the Geekom A5 (2026) with Windows 11 Pro is a very capable mini PC.

item.title: Les balais et robots aspirateurs les plus premium deviennent enfin abordables pendant les Ventes Flash Amazon
item.description: Le grand ménage de printemps devient un vrai jeu d’enfant grâce aux Ventes Flash d'Amazon. On trouve de grosses réductions sur les meilleurs aspirateurs robots et balais du moment. DJI, Dyson… c’est sans doute le moment de laisser la corvée de ménage à un robot !

item.title: Sennheiser RS 275 TV Headphone Bundle Review: Awesome Tech, OK Headphones
item.description: Sennheiser’s new TV transmitter system uses the power of Auracast to connect nearly infinite headphones—if you can find a pair you like.

item.title: Best Massage Guns of 2026: Hyperice, Therabody, and More
item.description: Massage guns used to be simple percussive devices. Now, they use vibrations, hot and cold therapy, and even LED light to ease post-workout pain and promote muscle recovery.

item.title: Microsoft confirms its next Xbox, Project Helix, will go out to studios next year — 'We plan to ship alpha versions of the hardware to developers beginning in 2027'
item.description: Microsoft has shared new details about its next-generation Xbox console, Project Helix, and confirmed it will be in developers' hands sooner than expected.

item.title: Iran-linked cyber attack targets US medtech giant Stryker
item.description: US medical equipment provider Stryker said its global networks were disrupted by a cyberattack on Wednesday, allegedly carried out by a hacking group linked to Iran. The attack impacted Stryker's internal Microsoft environment and deleted information from devices, with one employee telling NBC News that company phones stopped working, grinding work and communications to a […]...

item.title: Volkswagen métamorphose ses ID.4, ID.5 et ID.7, mais ces nouveautés vont déplaire aux anciens propriétaires
item.description: Volkswagen apporte de nombreuses améliorations à ses ID.4, ID.5 et ID.7. Au programme : nouvelle batterie, nouveau moteur, et arrivée d'Android Automotive, pour améliorer grandement le rapport qualité / prix de ces voitures électriques.

item.title: Google fouille dans les vieux journaux pour prédire les inondations
item.description: Google utilise son intelligence artificielle pour analyser d'anciennes coupures de presse et prévenir d'éventuelles montées des eaux.

item.title: Amazon fait une Fatality de -25% sur la borne d’arcade Mortal Kombat II avec 13 jeux rétro classiques
item.description: Pour retrouver l'ambiance des bars et des salles d'arcade des années 90, voici la reproduction de la borne d'arcade Mortal Kombat II disponible à 374,99 euros au lieu de 499,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: 'If anyone can make open earbuds work, it'd be Skullcandy': these new sports-specific buds could dethrone the Shokz — and cost half as much
item.description: The Skullcandy Push 540 Open combine old-school tools with Skullcandy magic, and it could give them the gumption to take on the Shokz as our favorite open earbuds.

item.title: I've searched hundreds of listings — these are the 40+ best Amazon Spring Sale deals for tech, appliances, essentials, and more
item.description: Don't waste your time! I've already found all of today's biggest and best deals in the massive Amazon Spring Deal Days sale.

item.title: Uber is piloting a robotaxi service in Tokyo
item.description: Uber has teamed up with UK self-driving car startup Wayve and Nissan to launch a pilot program for a robotaxi service in Tokyo in late 2026. The program will use Nissan Leaf EVs powered by Wayve’s AI Driver automated vehicle technology, which will then be connected to Uber’s platform. Trained drivers will be behind the wheel at first, as the deployed vehicles gather real-world data to be able to navigate Tokyo’s driving conditions and complex streets that are also a lot narrower than the roads in the US. Another company backed by Uber, Nuro, will also test its vehicles on Tokyo’s challenging s...

item.title: Volkswagen change (presque) tout à sa première voiture électrique : voici l’ID.3 Neo
item.description: Volkswagen vient d'annoncer le restylage de son ID.3, sa voiture électrique rivale de la Renault Mégane E-Tech. Des modifications a priori suffisamment importantes pour un nouveau nom : elle s'appellera Volkswagen ID.3 Neo. Voici ce qui devrait changer.

item.title: Domain-specific AI models are the future of enterprise ROI
item.description: Why smaller, domain-trained AI models outperform general-purpose LLMs in enterprise settings.

item.title: Revolut franchit une étape-clé et ambitionne désormais le titre de « première banque mondiale »
item.description: Après plusieurs années d'attente et d'épreuves réglementaires, la néobanque Revolut devient une véritable banque dans son pays d'origine et son premier marché en nombre de clients : le Royaume-Uni. Une étape essentielle pour Revolut qui vise désormais une expansion mondiale.
